steps: Login with an account where the trial ended 6 months ago
Navigate to the 'Reports' page
Select a report generated during the trial period
tests.expected_result: The report is successfully opened in read-only PDF format.

steps: Login with an account where the trial ended 13 months ago
Navigate to the 'Reports' page
Attempt to locate trial-period reports
tests.expected_result: The trial reports are no longer visible or accessible, as the 12-month retention period has expired.

steps: Disable internet connectivity
Open the application and navigate to the 'Log History' tab
Scroll through entries created within the last 72 hours
tests.expected_result: All entries created within the 72-hour window are visible while offline.

steps: Disable internet connectivity
Select a mood entry created 12 hours ago
Edit the text note and save the changes
tests.expected_result: The system allows the edit and saves the modified entry to the local cache successfully.

steps: Set a mood check-in reminder for 14:00
Put the application in the background
Monitor the device at 14:00
tests.expected_result: A push notification is received on the device before 14:01.

tests.scenario: Notification Delivery While Device is Locked
steps: Set a check-in reminder for 5 minutes from current time
Lock the device screen
Wait for the scheduled time
tests.expected_result: The notification appears on the lock screen within 60 seconds of the scheduled time.

steps: Adjust system settings font size to 200%
Launch the Mind Doc application
Navigate through the main dashboard and 'Insights' tab
tests.expected_result: All text elements scale to 200% increase without truncating or overlapping other UI components.

steps: Open a long journal entry with font size set to 200%
Verify that the container expands to hold the larger text
tests.expected_result: The text remains fully readable and the container dimensions adapt without breaking the layout.

steps: Tap the 'Crisis Support' button from the home screen
Select the 'Call' option from the pop-up menu
tests.expected_result: The device's native phone/dialer app opens with the national crisis lifeline number pre-filled.

steps: Access the Crisis Support pop-up from any sub-menu
Select the 'Text' option
tests.expected_result: The native messaging app opens with a pre-addressed SMS to a national crisis support number.

steps: Navigate to Settings > Display
Toggle 'High Contrast Display Mode' to ON
Return to the Dashboard
tests.expected_result: The UI updates to a high-contrast theme meeting WCAG 2.2 AAA standards (ratio > 7:1).

steps: Enable High Contrast mode
Navigate through 'Insights', 'Journal', and 'Account' pages
tests.expected_result: Every screen in the application reflects the selected high-contrast mode settings.

steps: Create a journal entry containing the word 'Anxiety'
Enter 'Anxiety' into the search bar
Trigger the search
tests.expected_result: Matching results are filtered and displayed on the screen in less than 500ms.

steps: Input a non-existent random string in the search bar
Trigger the search
tests.expected_result: The system processes the search and displays the empty state in under 500ms.

steps: Log 5 unique mood entries into a new account
Navigate to the 'Insights' dashboard
tests.expected_result: A mood trend line graph is rendered successfully within 1.5 seconds.

steps: Log only 4 mood entries
Navigate to the 'Insights' dashboard
tests.expected_result: The trend visualization is not displayed, and a message appears stating more logs are needed.

steps: Generate 30 days worth of logs
Tap the 'Generate 30-Day Report' button
tests.expected_result: A PDF file is generated containing all 30 days of mood data and notes.

steps: Generate a 30-day report
Open the PDF and check the order of entries
tests.expected_result: All entries are listed in chronological order from oldest to newest.

steps: Generate a report PDF
Select 'Share via Email' and enter a recipient address
Check the recipient's inbox
tests.expected_result: The recipient receives an email containing a secure, encrypted link to download the report.

steps: Send a secure report link to an email address
Attempt to click the link 25 hours after it was sent
tests.expected_result: The link fails to open or redirects to an 'Expired' page, adhering to the 24-hour expiration limit.
